Variance Mismatch Alert: There is a discrepancy between Total Duties/Taxes Payable and Paid. Please inspect the difference row on the Para D6 Statement tab.

Welcome to the Accounting and Tax Reconciliation Portal

This system automates the multi-stage tax auditing and reconciliation pipeline. It digests GSTR-3B filings across 12 monthly periods, appends raw files, filters out payable liabilities, segments the data by forward vs reverse charge mechanisms, and compiles a finished Para D6 Reconciliation Matrix sheet with native spreadsheet formulas.

Process Pipeline Stages

1. Consolidation

Parses outward liability tables from 12 PDFs and compiles them into a unified chronological master ledger.

2. Filtering & Segmentation

Filters GSTR Table 3.1 sections (a) to (e), and splits them into Output A (Forward Charge) and Output B (RCM).

3. Reporting & Excel

Builds dynamic Pivot summaries and the Para D6 matrix with live Excel formulas for spreadsheet exports.

How to Get Started Immediately

Click "Load 12 Months Sample Data" in the sidebar simulation card to immediately populate the tables, chart elements, and D6 sheet with structured financial figures.

Alternatively, click "Generate 12 Sample PDFs", save the generated ZIP file, extract it, and drop the resulting 12 GSTR-3B PDF files into the drag-and-drop zone to evaluate the local text parsing engines.

Raw Consolidated Master Ledger (Combined 12 Period PDF Outputs)

First Stage Filtered Data: Payable Classification (GSTR-3B 3.1 Rows a to e)
Period Source File Classification Nature of Supplies Taxable Value IGST CGST SGST Cess
No filtered data. Please initiate ingestion.
Output A: Pivot Summary (Forward Charge - 3.1a, b, c, e)
No Output A pivot table available.
Output B: Pivot Summary (Reverse Charge - 3.1d)
No Output B pivot table available.

GSTR Para D6 Reconciliation Matrix

Adjust any ledger values directly in the grid. Total sums and difference calculations will update dynamically in real time.

Reconciliation Note: Columns C (Taxable Value) and D (Excise/VAT/Other State Taxes) are shaded out for Input Tax Credit rows, in accordance with regulatory filing specifications. Highlighting row 32 checks if all calculated liabilities have been properly discharged.
Values Fetched & Extracted Text (For Audit Verification)

This panel displays the exact text lines extracted from each processed PDF document and the parsed table values for audit tracing.

No PDF files parsed yet. Upload files or load sample data in the sidebar.
